channel.title: NRIBeat — Daily Pulse for Indian Americans
channel.description: Immigration, AI, Cricket, Bollywood, and Layoffs — curated daily for the Indian-American community.

item.title: Postcards from Hong Kong: Ridhi Dogra's New Travel Series on Hotstar 2026
item.description: Bollywood star Ridhi Dogra fronts National Geographic's new two-episode travel series Postcards from Hong Kong, premiering March 28 on JioHotstar. The documentary explores Hong Kong beyond its iconic skyline with authentic stories and local experiences — perfect for Indian diaspora audiences seeking quality content. Stream it now on JioHotstar Premium ($5.99/month) in the US.

item.title: IPL 2025 Opening Night: RCB vs SRH at Chinnaswamy Stadium
item.description: IPL 2025 kicked off at the historic M. Chinnaswamy Stadium with RCB taking on SRH in a thrilling opener that reminded us why we lose sleep for India cricket. Key performances from Virat Kohli and Abhishek Sharma, plus your complete guide to catching IPL 2025 matches from the US.

item.title: MS Dhoni IPL 2026: Calf Strain Sidelines Cricket Legend
item.description: MS Dhoni's calf strain has sidelined the CSK captain for IPL 2026's opening two weeks. The legendary wicketkeeper will undergo rehabilitation while CSK tests its bench strength. For Indian cricket fans in the US, this impacts IPL viewing schedules and raises questions about Dhoni's availability for India's upcoming international commitments later in 2026.

item.title: March 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to September 15, 2013
item.description: March 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to September 15, 2013; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 November 01, 2014, EB-3 August 15, 2014. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

item.title: Project Hail Mary Gets All 34 IMAX Screens in India 2026
item.description: Fan power just secured Project Hail Mary on all 34 IMAX screens in India after Sony Pictures initially landed only 6. Mumbai's Eros Cinema added a rare 3:45 AM weekend show, proving audience demand drives theatrical strategy. Streaming comes later; catch it in IMAX now.

item.title: Mohanlal Gets Delhi Court Protection for Personality Rights 2026
item.description: Malayalam star Mohanlal just won interim protection for his personality rights from India's Delhi High Court—a landmark ruling that affects how streaming platforms handle celebrity images across Netflix, Prime, and Hotstar. This strengthens legal protections for all Indian actors in the digital age and ensures more authentic content for diaspora audiences.

item.title: AI Gender Gap 2026: How It's Affecting Your Tech Career
item.description: New data shows AI adoption is widening the gender gap in tech—but Indian engineers who master AI tools for developers, learn fairness/bias concepts, and position themselves as AI architects (not replacements) are securing premium salaries and job security. Your move: skill up in prompt engineering and responsible AI now; it's worth 15-22% more in machine learning salaries.

item.title: Real Estate Stock Crash 2026: Should Tech Professionals Invest Now?
item.description: Real estate stocks have crashed 22-32% in 2026 due to IT layoffs and geopolitical tensions. Indian tech professionals should consider selective purchases of quality large-cap players, with April's RBI MPC meeting serving as a key decision point that could trigger a recovery in valuations and mortgage affordability.

item.title: AI in Education: Global Strategies & Your Career Impact 2026
item.description: Global governments are finalizing AI-in-education policies faster than before. For Indian tech professionals in the US, this creates opportunities in EdTech ML roles—especially if you understand both policy and code. Machine learning salaries in education are rising for specialized engineers who can handle privacy, compliance, and ChatGPT alternatives.

item.title: Australia Cricket Crisis: IPL Money Threatening Test Cricket 2026
item.description: Australia's captain is warning that franchise cricket money—especially from the IPL—is pulling players away from Test cricket contracts. If Cricket Australia can't compete financially with the IPL, their national teams will suffer, potentially weakening future India vs Australia test series and threatening the survival of Test cricket globally.

item.title: Thushara Fails IPL 2026 Fitness Test, RCB Denied NOC
item.description: Sri Lankan pacer Thushara has been blocked from joining RCB for IPL 2026 after failing BCCI's mandatory fitness test. Meanwhile, KKR's Pathirana and LSG's Hasaranga are still awaiting their test results, making this a developing story that could reshape the entire IPL 2026 season for overseas player availability.

item.title: Project Hail Mary IMAX Screens India 2025: What Happened?
item.description: Project Hail Mary secured only 6 of India's 34 IMAX screens due to competition from Dhurandhar The Revenge's blockbuster success. The film will likely stream on Netflix, Prime Video, or Disney+ Hotstar within 60 days of theatrical release. US-based Indian diaspora audiences can expect high-quality sci-fi content even if it skips premium formats.

item.title: Australia's Molineux Shines Beyond Bowling in West Indies Tour 2026
item.description: Australia's coaching staff has discovered that Josh Molineux offers massive value beyond his bowling statistics—his captaincy and leadership potential during the West Indies tour have impressed ahead of the T20 World Cup 2026. As India cricket scores dominate headlines and the India vs Australia rivalry intensifies, Australia's focus on developing smarter leaders (not just skilled bowlers) could be the edge they need in upcoming tournaments.

item.title: Toaster: Rajkummar Rao Netflix Dark Comedy April 15, 2026
item.description: Toaster, a dark comedy starring Rajkummar Rao and Sanya Malhotra, drops on Netflix April 15, 2026. This quirky Netflix India original turns a wedding gift into an instrument of chaos. Streaming in the US now requires only a Netflix subscription—perfect for NRIs seeking experimental Indian cinema beyond traditional Bollywood.

item.title: India Cricket 2026-27: Zimbabwe Tour Returns After 24 Years
item.description: Zimbabwe cricket returns to India for the first bilateral tour since 2002 during an action-packed 2026-27 season. Bengaluru is hosting matches, offering convenient US viewing times for NRI fans tracking every India cricket score.

item.title: Australia Cricket Crisis: IPL Money Luring Players Away in 2026
item.description: Australia's captain warns that IPL and franchise cricket are tempting players with sums Cricket Australia can't match—risking an exodus that weakens Test cricket and international competition. For Indian cricket fans in the US, this means potentially weaker opponents for India, reshaping the global cricket landscape as financial power shifts from national boards to T20 leagues.

item.title: Seema Sajdeh The Traitors Season 2 India 2026
item.description: Seema Sajdeh from Fabulous Lives of Bollywood Wives is being considered for The Traitors India Season 2, Netflix's hit reality psychological thriller format. The show, which begins filming later in 2026, is expected to premiere in late 2026 and will stream globally on Netflix—making it accessible to Indian diaspora viewers across the US.

item.title: Kleiner Perkins $3.5B AI Fund: What It Means for Your Tech Career [2026]
item.description: Kleiner Perkins' $3.5B AI fund signals a massive hiring surge for AI-skilled engineers starting mid-2026. Machine learning salaries are about to rise, and ChatGPT alternatives will compete for dominance. Indian engineers should start learning Claude and Llama now—skills in these tools become job-market essentials.

item.title: Drone Tech for Police: Game-Changer for Public Safety Jobs [2026]
item.description: Brinc launched a 911 drone to replace police helicopters, creating immediate demand for ML, robotics, and backend engineers. Indian tech professionals can pivot into this high-pay public safety sector ($140K–$240K for mid-senior roles) by building drone + ML projects now. This is one of the few AI growth areas not threatened by ChatGPT alternatives.

item.title: Coney & Tiffen NZC Hall of Fame 2026: Cricket Legends Honored
item.description: New Zealand cricket icons Coney and Tiffen have been inducted into the prestigious NZC Hall of Fame, with their formal ceremony happening at the New Zealand Cricket Awards. For Indian cricket fans in the US, this honor highlights how cricket's greatest achievements transcend borders, reminding us that excellence in the sport comes from every nation and era.
